overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character exploring a dimly lit industrial backroom with vibrant neon lighting. The player enters through a frosted glass doorway, walks past a glowing green arrow sign to inspect a vending machine area with a distant figure, then turns around and exits back through the entrance door.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with metal lockers

events.description: entering the room through the frosted glass doorway

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the doorway into the dimly lit industrial backroom, passing metal lockers on the left

entered.detail: metal-framed door with frosted glass panels, the entrance point
tall beige metal storage lockers with multiple compartments
large glowing cyan arrow sign mounted on the concrete wall pointing right
exposed metal piping and conduits running along the ceiling
distant illuminated vending machines with glowing displays

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit industrial backroom through a frosted glass door. Metal lockers line the left wall while a prominent neon green arrow sign glows on the right. The camera moves forward through the narrow corridor, revealing exposed ceiling pipes and a distant vending machine area bathed in purple neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open back area with vending machines and neon lighting

events.description: slowing down to observe the vending machine area and surroundings

agents.ego_description: approaching the vending machine cluster and observing the back area of the room

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing standing near the vending machines

entered.detail: long magenta-purple fluorescent light fixture hanging from the ceiling
thick black electrical cable snaking across the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the open back area where vending machines glow with purple neon light. A figure in white stands near the machines in the distance. The green arrow sign is now visible behind on the left, while a thick black cable runs across the floor. The space opens up with industrial pillars and overhead lighting.

events.description: turning around to head back toward the entrance door
approaching the frosted glass exit door to leave the room

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back toward the entrance, passing the neon arrow sign on the right

entered.detail: the same frosted glass entrance door now approached from the opposite side
the beige metal lockers now visible again on the left as we return

segments.scene_description: The player turns around and walks back toward the entrance, leaving the vending machine area behind. The neon arrow sign passes from left to right as the camera approaches the frosted glass door. The metal lockers come back into view on the left as the player reaches the exit point to leave the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial backroom that transitions from a narrow corridor into an open neon-lit area before returning to the entrance. It begins by passing through a frosted glass door into a tight space lined with metal lockers and a glowing green neon arrow. As the camera moves forward under exposed ceiling pipes, the corridor opens into a wider industrial zone where purple neon light from vending machines illuminates a distant figure in white and thick cables on the floor. The scene then shifts as the camera turns around, leaving the open area behind and passing the neon arrow once more. Finally, the view returns to the metal lockers and the frosted glass door as the player reaches the exit point.
